Game.Name: Derby Jockey 2 (Japan)
Game.plot: Derby Jockey 2 is a Sports game, developed by Graphic Research and published by Asmik Ace Entertainment, Inc,which was released in Japan in 1995.
Game.Notes: A horseracing simulator that offers players the opportunity to raise their own racehorses and use them to compete in competitions across Japan, heading up to the prestigious G1 tier. The game is a sequel to 1994's Derby Jockey: Kishou e no Michi and features similar gameplay.
